name: 事業夥伴暗生情愫
description: Noah和Michelle的關係建立在共同的電影事業上，從專業合作到深情守護。Noah隱藏感情八年只為保護她，這種克制的深情極具浪漫張力。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: There's been a slight misunderstanding. She thinks I'm gay. ... And I thought if I told her I was off limits that I could protect her. I know it's stupid. ... Noah, if you love her, tell her.
examples.context: Noah和Michelle的關係建立在共同的電影事業上，從專業合作到深情守護。Noah隱藏感情八年只為保護她，這種克制的深情極具浪漫張力。
